hooks.command: GATE_PATTERN='review|debate|finding' GATE_MSG='Your findings must include file:line evidence for every issue. Please re-review and cite specific code locations.' "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR"/hooks/task-gate.sh

GATE_PATTERN='dev-loop|explore|implement|review|fix|finding' GATE_MSG='Your output must include file:line evidence. Re-examine the code and cite specific locations.' "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR"/hooks/task-gate.sh
GATE_PATTERN='respond|fix-thread|reply-thread' GATE_MSG='Your output must include file:line evidence. Cite the specific file and line number you fixed.' "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR"/hooks/task-gate.sh

NUDGE_PATTERN='review-pr' NUDGE_CHECK_TASKS=1 NUDGE_MSG='You still have pending debate tasks. Please review your assigned teammate\'s findings and respond with Agree, Challenge, or Escalate per the debate protocol.' "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR"/hooks/idle-nudge.sh

NUDGE_PATTERN='dev-loop' NUDGE_CHECK_TASKS=1 NUDGE_MSG='You have pending tasks. Please continue working on your assigned phase tasks and message the team lead when done.' "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR"/hooks/idle-nudge.sh

NUDGE_PATTERN='respond' NUDGE_MSG='You are idle. Continue fixing your assigned threads and message the team lead when done. If blocked, message lead with: thread number, what you tried, and where you are stuck.' "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR"/hooks/idle-nudge.sh

NUDGE_PATTERN='^debug-' NUDGE_MSG='You are idle. Continue your investigation and send findings to the team lead when done. If blocked, message the lead with: what you tried, what you found, and where you are stuck.' "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR"/hooks/idle-nudge.sh
FILE=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.md$'; then npx markdownlint-cli2 --fix "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; fi

hooks.prompt: If stop_hook_active is true in the input, respond {"ok": true} immediately. Otherwise: Focus ONLY on the most recent user message and the assistant's immediate response to it. Do NOT treat previous stop hook feedback messages in conversation history as evidence of pending work — those are historical records. Check: (1) Did the assistant directly answer what the user just asked? (2) Are there TodoWrite items in-progress that were promised this turn but not completed? (3) Did the assistant explicitly promise something this turn and not deliver it? If all pass, respond {"ok": true}. If work from THIS TURN is genuinely unfinished, respond {"ok": false, "reason": "what specifically remains from this turn"}.

hooks.command: osascript -e 'display notification "Claude Code needs your attention" with title "Claude Code"'
